title: secretx/src/lib.rs: rewrite dispatch with inventory iteration
description:
Replace the hardcoded match statements in from_uri, from_uri_writable, and from_signing_uri with inventory::iter loops. Remove signing_only_err helper. Remove all #[cfg(feature)] guards from dispatch functions.

What: The dispatch file becomes feature-agnostic; backends self-register and are discovered at runtime.

Algorithm:
1. Add inventory dep to secretx/Cargo.toml (version matching secretx-core)
2. Add use secretx_core::{BackendRegistration, WritableBackendRegistration, SigningBackendRegistration}; in secretx/src/lib.rs
3. Rewrite from_uri (currently lines 59-118):
   a. Keep: let parsed = SecretUri::parse(uri)?;
   b. Keep: let backend_name = parsed.backend();
   c. Replace match with: for reg in inventory::iter::<BackendRegistration>() { if reg.name == backend_name { return (reg.factory)(uri); } }
   d. After loop: check signing-only: for reg in inventory::iter::<SigningBackendRegistration>() { if reg.name == backend_name { return Err(SecretError::InvalidUri(format!('{} is a signing-only backend; use secretx::from_signing_uri instead', backend_name))); } }
   e. Final fallthrough: Err(SecretError::InvalidUri(format!('unknown or disabled backend  — enable the corresponding feature flag')))
4. Rewrite from_uri_writable (currently lines 138-188):
   a. Same URI parse
   b. Check WritableBackendRegistration first (return if found)
   c. Check BackendRegistration (return read-only error if found)
   d. Check SigningBackendRegistration (return signing-only error if found)
   e. Fallthrough unknown error
   f. Error messages must exactly match current messages (tests assert on content):
      - read-only: '{backend} backend is read-only; use secretx::from_uri for read access'
      - signing-only: '{backend} is a signing-only backend; use secretx::from_signing_uri instead'
5. Rewrite from_signing_uri (currently lines 198-217):
   a. Check SigningBackendRegistration (return if found)
   b. Fallthrough: Err(SecretError::InvalidUri(format!('unknown or disabled signing backend...')))
6. Remove signing_only_err helper fn (lines 50-57) — now dead code
7. Remove all #[cfg(feature = '...')] guards from the three dispatch functions
8. Remove the use/extern statements that were only needed for the cfg-gated arms (but keep any still needed)
9. Add inventory dep to secretx/Cargo.toml

Defensive programming rules:
- Never log the URI string — only backend_name (which is the scheme component, not a credential)
- No unwrap() anywhere in dispatch
- Error messages must exactly match existing test assertions (do not change wording)
- from_uri must check BackendRegistration first, then SigningBackendRegistration (not vice versa)
- from_uri_writable must check: WritableBackendRegistration -> BackendRegistration -> SigningBackendRegistration -> unknown
- No feature guards in the three dispatch functions after this change

Agent team: standard (Researcher + Implementer + Tester + Validator)
